Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle.
Changelog: v1.0.5.7: hotfix — revert the 1.0.5.6 mirror matching change that broke action pulses (it resolved combos for every hotbar slot per press). Dancer dance-step mirroring is kept. v1.0.5.6: action-press mirror no longer suppresses Dancer steps — presses pulse their host slots (Cascade/Reverse Cascade/Fountain/Fountain Fall). v1.0.5.5: add Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker). v1.0.5.4: Performance Mode fully disables the hotbar icon-swap hook so icons stay native; combos still resolve on button press.
